customer_anxiety_profile: Low-engagement, minimal communicator. Barbara answers questions but volunteers nothing. No expressed anxiety or skepticism — more passive than resistant. Her son is the operational decision-maker (handles electric account, on the title) and his buy-in is the real variable.
unresolved_concerns: Son's name, contact information, and confirmed availability for Monday 10AM not captured — appointment is tentative on Barbara's preference only
Roof age never asked — unknown whether roof is within the 15-year threshold or a potential DQ/cross-sell signal
Electric bill not collected and no mechanism established for the closer to obtain it — closer will arrive without usage data
Utility company unknown — Barbara deferred to son; closer needs to establish this before or during the appointment
Tree shading: Barbara said she would 'consider' trimming/cutting — not a firm commitment; closer should assess shading impact and revisit
sensitive_topics_raised: Recent move (~3 months) — Barbara may not know property details (roof age, utility, bill history)
Son handles all financial/utility matters — Barbara's decision-making authority on her own may be limited
exact_promises_rep_made: Monday at 10AM appointment with a specialist
Text message with date and time sent after the call
Specialist will show the design and answer questions about savings
closer_should_know: The son is on the title and manages the electric account — Barbara booked tentatively without confirming his availability. Verify the son will be on the Monday 10AM call before the sit begins; if he's not present, the appointment is unlikely to close. Also: no bill data exists (recent move, ~3 months), no utility company identified, and roof age was never asked — all three need to be established at or before the appointment.
